pages.title: Once spotted
pages.text: If you want to hold your ground, write $(l)ه‌ڑ$(). If knockback and explosions are the problem, write $(l)ç¨³$().$(br2)Use $(l)هٹ›$() for low-tier damage. Switch to $(l)و€’$() at diamond and above. و€’ counts final damage, so ه؟چ, armor, resistance, and similar effects happen before rage records what actually reached you.

pages.title: After the fight
pages.text: Make sure nothing is in your face, then write $(l)وپ¯$() and stand still to recover.$(br2)If you still have ink wound or negative effects, write $(l)ه‡€$(). If you recently died, return to safety and write $(l)é­„$() quickly, before your dropped items vanish.
